auth.label: API Key
auth.description: ProjectManager API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Admins can create keys from Integrations > API Keys in the ProjectManager app.

actions.name: get_project
actions.description: Retrieve a ProjectManager project by its unique identifier.

projectId.description: The unique identifier of the Project to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a Project.

item.description: One ProjectManager object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: A ProjectManager object response normalized for connector callers.

actions.name: list_projects
actions.description: Query ProjectManager projects with optional OData parameters.

top.description: The number of records to return.

skip.description: The number of records to skip before returning records.

filter.description: The OData filter expression to apply.

orderby.description: The OData order expression to apply.

expand.description: The related data to include in the response.

inputSchema.description: OData query parameters for a ProjectManager collection endpoint.

items.description: One ProjectManager object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: A ProjectManager collection response normalized for connector callers.

actions.name: list_tasks
actions.description: Query ProjectManager tasks with optional OData parameters.

top.description: The number of records to return.

skip.description: The number of records to skip before returning records.

filter.description: The OData filter expression to apply.

orderby.description: The OData order expression to apply.

expand.description: The related data to include in the response.

inputSchema.description: OData query parameters for a ProjectManager collection endpoint.

items.description: One ProjectManager object returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: A ProjectManager collection response normalized for connector callers.
